title: Trackpad-style two-finger scroll on a custom view
design_brief: A custom scrollable view (canvas, map) accepting two-finger pan scroll, like iPad trackpad scrolling. Reference: Procreate canvas, Figma mobile.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Single-finger scroll on canvas (conflicts with draw)
mobile_reasoning: Gesture.Pan().minPointers(2).maxPointers(2). On end, withDecay for momentum.
accessibility_considerations: Provide alternative scroll buttons for VoiceOver.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Multi-touch only. 2) Native decay physics. 3) Composes with single-finger drawing.

title: Modal stack with dismissable cards (Apple Wallet style)
design_brief: Multiple card-style modals stacked, swipe down to dismiss top one revealing next. Reference: Apple Wallet passes.
mobile_reasoning: Each card has progressively higher Y-offset. Top card's pan dismisses it.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Apple Wallet pass dismissal. 2) Stack metaphor.

title: FlashList with separators that don't break recycling
design_brief: List with separators between items. Implemented via ItemSeparatorComponent (preserves recycling).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Separator as part of each item (breaks size estimation)
mobile_reasoning: FlashList's ItemSeparatorComponent renders between items without affecting cell size.
performance_notes: Separator outside cell — no size variance.

title: Skeleton-to-content fade swap
design_brief: When data loads, skeleton fades out and real content fades in at the same time (crossfade). Reference: any well-designed loading state.
mobile_reasoning: Render both with absolute positioning + opacity transition. Skeleton opacity 1→0; content 0→1.

title: Live transcription overlay for video
design_brief: Video player with live captions overlay (TikTok-style auto captions). Reference: TikTok, Instagram Reels.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No styling for legibility (use background pill)
mobile_reasoning: Captions positioned at bottom third. Background pill with auto-shrink to text width.

title: Geofence visualization on map
design_brief: Display a circular geofence radius on map. User can drag center or resize radius. Reference: Reminders 'Remind me here', Tile geofences.
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps Circle component. Center marker draggable. Radius slider OR pinch-to-resize.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Native draggable marker. 2) Map-native circle overlay.

title: Mini sparkline inside a button
design_brief: A pill button that shows a tiny trend chart inline (Robinhood watchlist tap). Reference: Robinhood quick view chips.
mobile_reasoning: Reuse Sparkline from rn-029 at small size.

title: Maximalist: vibrant gradients, layered type, asymmetric
design_brief: A loud, expressive app aesthetic. Vibrant gradients, layered type, asymmetric. Reference: Apple Watch fitness, expressive design movement.
mobile_reasoning: Multiple gradient overlays, mixed type weights and rotations.
what_makes_this_native: 1) LinearGradient is native. 2) Display weight type.

title: InteractionManager-based deferred analytics
design_brief: Fire analytics events after interactions complete to avoid blocking the UI.
mobile_reasoning: InteractionManager.runAfterInteractions queues work post-animation/gesture frame.

title: Push notification deep-link handling
design_brief: Tapping a push notification opens the relevant screen. Reference: any messaging app.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: App opens to home then navigates
No initial notification handling on cold start
mobile_reasoning: expo-notifications addNotificationResponseReceivedListener handles taps. getLastNotificationResponseAsync for cold start.
interaction_details: Cold start: navigates to notification's path

title: Search with voice input button
design_brief: Search bar with microphone icon to start voice dictation. Reference: Google search, iOS Spotlight.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Permission flow at first tap (should explain)
mobile_reasoning: @react-native-voice/voice or use Expo's Speech. UI shows pulsing mic during capture, transcribed text fills input live.

title: Universal back button: header back + system back coordination
design_brief: Single onBack handler that handles header back tap, hardware back (Android), and edge swipe (iOS). Reference: any well-engineered app.
mobile_reasoning: Centralize via useBackHandler hook that handles all three sources.

stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: Hardware back Android-only; edge swipe iOS-only.

interaction_details: All back sources go through one handler
Returns true to consume or false to allow default
accessibility_considerations: VoiceOver back gesture also routes through nav.

title: Brutalist meets retro: monospace + harsh contrast + scan effect
design_brief: Mashup aesthetic: brutalist hard edges + retro monospace + scanlines. Reference: Diablo IV mobile menus, vaporwave indie apps.
mobile_reasoning: Same as brutalist but add scanline overlay from rn-053.

title: Background download with progress notification
design_brief: Download a large file in background, show notification progress. Reference: Spotify offline downloads.
mobile_reasoning: expo-file-system createDownloadResumable + onProgress + expo-notifications for progress.

title: Map snapshot for preview cards
design_brief: Generate a static map image for a card preview (no interactive map needed).
mobile_reasoning: react-native-maps MapView.takeSnapshot generates an image of the current map state. Or use Apple's Map Snapshot URL on iOS.
interaction_details: First render: live map captures snapshot
what_makes_this_native: 1) Map-snapshot is native. 2) Lighter than live map.

title: Radial progress with percentage center
design_brief: Round progress indicator with percentage in the center. Reference: Strava goal, Apple Activity rings.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Linear over circular for progress goals
mobile_reasoning: Skia arc + Text in center.

title: Optimized image cache invalidation
design_brief: Invalidate user-avatar cache when profile updates without nuking the entire image cache.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No cache busting on avatar change
mobile_reasoning: expo-image keys cache by URI. Append ?v={timestamp} to avatar URL on update, OR use Image.clearDiskCache({key}) targeted.

title: Numeric input with custom number-pad
design_brief: For PIN entry or amount: a custom big-key number pad overlay instead of system keyboard. Reference: bank app PIN entry, Cash App amount.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Default system keyboard for PIN (security concern)
mobile_reasoning: Custom 3×4 grid of large Pressables. Per-key haptic.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Custom keyboard avoids screen-record exposure (security PINs). 2) Per-key haptic.

title: Background color shift to indicate mode change
design_brief: App background subtly shifts color when entering 'focus mode' (e.g., timer running). Communicates state change.
mobile_reasoning: Background color interpolated via shared value + interpolateColor.
what_makes_this_native: 1) UI-thread color shift. 2) Ambient state cue.

title: App icon: alternate icons (iOS) and adaptive (Android)
design_brief: Allow user to switch app icon (iOS supports natively). Adaptive icon on Android (background + foreground).
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Same icon both platforms (Android needs adaptive)
mobile_reasoning: iOS: setAlternateIconName from expo-system-ui or react-native-change-icon. Android: configure adaptiveIcon in app.json.

stylesheet_strategy.platform_differences: iOS alternate icons; Android adaptive icon shape determined by launcher.

interaction_details: User picks new icon → iOS prompts confirmation → home screen icon updates
what_makes_this_native: 1) iOS alt icons. 2) Android adaptive icon shape support.

title: Voice-friendly action confirmation
design_brief: When VoiceOver focuses a destructive action, announcement includes 'double-tap to delete forever' to prevent accidental triggers.
mobile_reasoning: accessibilityHint provides what happens on activation. For destructive: emphasize permanence.
interaction_details: VoiceOver: 'Delete account, button, Destructive action, cannot be undone'
accessibility_considerations: This task IS the consideration. Hint communicates consequence.
what_makes_this_native: 1) accessibilityHint is read after label. 2) Destructive context.

title: Pinch-to-collapse a thread into a single line
design_brief: In a chat or document, pinch-in to collapse a multi-paragraph block to one line summary. Pinch-out reverses. Reference: emerging gesture patterns.
mobile_reasoning: Pinch scale value drives height interpolation. Below threshold: collapse, above: expand.

title: Sheet with header that has title + close button
design_brief: Standard pattern: sheet header with title (center or left) and close button (X right). Reference: iOS native sheets, many app modals.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: No close button (only drag down works)
mobile_reasoning: Simple but ubiquitous header. Close X with 44pt hit slop.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Centered title is iOS norm. 2) Round close button.

title: FlashList with grouped rendering (header + items pattern)
design_brief: Settings or contact list with grouped sections. Each group has header + items.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Headers as part of items (size variance)
No getItemType for header vs item
mobile_reasoning: Flat data with type tags. getItemType returns 'header' or 'item' for recycling.

title: Auto-capitalizing first letter of sentences
design_brief: Notes/text-heavy fields auto-capitalize at start of sentences. Reference: iOS Notes default behavior.
mobile_reasoning: TextInput's autoCapitalize='sentences' is built in.

title: Modal nav with swipe-down dismiss respecting nested scroll
design_brief: A modal with a ScrollView inside. Swipe down at scrollY=0 dismisses modal; otherwise scrolls content. Reference: iOS Mail message detail.
anti_patterns_to_avoid: Swipe-down dismisses even when scrolling content
mobile_reasoning: Pan composed with ScrollView. Pan activates only when scrollY <= 0 and direction down.

stylesheet_strategy.organization: Composed in rn-073 pattern with scroll arbitration.

gesture_strategy: Pan with scroll arbitration from rn-002.
interaction_details: At top + drag down: modal dismisses

title: Tab bar icon bounce on tab selection
design_brief: Selected tab icon does a subtle bounce when tapped. Reference: Twitter/X tab bar.
mobile_reasoning: Tab icon scale spring on press.

title: Audio playback notification (lock screen controls)
design_brief: Playing audio shows lock screen / control center controls. Reference: Spotify, Apple Music.
mobile_reasoning: expo-av or native module configures NowPlaying / MediaSession.
interaction_details: Lock screen controls reflect current track

title: Y2K aesthetic: chrome, bevels, vibrant hyperlink-blue
design_brief: A nostalgic Y2K-era app skin: chrome bevels, beveled buttons, hyperlink blue, sans-serif. Reference: 2000s web design / Geocities revival.
mobile_reasoning: Layered shadows for chrome effect. Bright #0000EE blue.
what_makes_this_native: 1) Mimics OS-level controls of yore. 2) Tactile via shadows.

title: Memory profiling with Flipper / DevTools
design_brief: Pattern for finding memory leaks in RN apps. Common leaks: forgotten subscriptions, ref accumulation, lazy imports never released.
mobile_reasoning: Profile via Hermes profiler + Flipper. Common pattern: every useEffect with subscription needs cleanup.
performance_notes: Profiled via Flipper or Hermes profiler.
